data.title: Tech Foundry completes SOC 2 Type 2 exam in Alexandria, VA on Feb. 17, 2026, affirming commitment to security.
data.description: In Alexandria, Virginia on February 17, 2026, Tech Foundry, a custom software development company, shared news of achieving success in its System and Organization Controls (SOC) 2 Type 2 audit. This validates the firm's dedication to ensuring secure systems and processes.

data.title: Northern Tool + Equipment in Norfolk offers customers two free Monster Jam tickets on March 5. Exciting store event.
data.description: In Norfolk, Virginia, on February 17, 2026, the store event at Northern Tool + Equipment is offering a special promotion for local customers. They are giving away two complimentary tickets for the Monster Jam® event. This high-energy event is set to take place on Thursday, March 5.

data.title: Atrium exceeds $1B customer ROI goal with AI-driven delivery, showcasing financial benefits for businesses.
data.description: Atrium, a prominent partner of Salesforce and Snowflake, has successfully achieved its goal of $1 billion in customer impact as indicated in the Customer Impact Dashboard goal set only a year ago. This achievement exemplifies the significant financial advantages that AI-assisted delivery brings to businesses. Headquartered in Bozeman, Montana, Atrium is recognized as the sole AI-native partner of Salesforce and Snowflake. The accomplishment underscores the value of leveraging AI technologies for business success.

data.title: Hahn & Hahn LLP sponsors The Huntington's exhibition "This Land Is..." commemorating Declaration of Independence's 250th anniversary.
data.description: In Pasadena, California, on February 17, 2026, Hahn & Hahn LLP revealed their support for The Huntington Library, Art Museum, and Botanical Gardens's significant exhibition "This Land Is…," marking the 250th anniversary of the Declaration of Independence.

data.title: Brave Healer Productions releases book "Write Your Dream Life: 3 Minutes to Manifestation" by CEO Laura Di Franco.
data.description: In Bethesda, Maryland, on February 17, 2026, Brave Healer Productions revealed the launch of a new book titled "Write Your Dream Life: 3 Minutes to Manifestation," authored by the company's CEO, Laura Di Franco. The book introduces a straightforward daily exercise designed to eliminate emotional clutter.

data.title: Central Garden & Pet (NASDAQ: CENT, CENTA) boosts stock repurchase program by $100 million, aiming for more acquisitions.
data.description: In Walnut Creek, California, Central Garden & Pet Company, listed on NASDAQ as CENT and CENTA, a prominent player in pet and garden goods, revealed an expansion of its stock buyback program. The Board of Directors greenlit purchasing up to $100 million more of the company's common stock and Class A common stock. This move signals the company's confidence and financial strength, allowing for strategic investments in its own shares.

data.title: Kunes Auto & RV Group in Delavan, WI, announces COO Scott Kunes stepping away, reaffirms growth.
data.description: In Delavan, Wisconsin on February 17, 2026, Kunes Auto & RV Group, a rapidly expanding dealership group in the Midwest, revealed that Scott Kunes will be leaving his position as COO to explore new ventures. This decision comes as the company continues to grow, with a significant impact on the automotive and recreational vehicle market.

data.title: NetXD named visionary in 2026 Gartner Magic Quadrant for Banking Payment Hub Platforms, offers cloud-based XD Payments.
data.description: In Lawrence, Kansas, NetXD, a cloud-native payment hub technology provider, has been recognized as a Visionary in the 2026 Gartner® Magic Quadrant™ for Banking Payment Hub Platforms. The report was released on January 20, 2026. NetXD's XD Payments platform, which is ISO 20022-compliant, is offered through SaaS and PaaS models and provides a modern, cloud-based payment hub. This platform allows financial institutions to outsource payment processing while retaining configuration flexibility.

data.title: "Global Trivia Tournament "Year of the Horse" launched by Masters of Trivia for Lunar New Year 2026 brings culture, learning, and competition."
data.description: In Boerne, Texas on February 17, 2026, the company Masters of Trivia introduced a seasonal zodiac challenge. This challenge combines educational cultural facts suitable for classrooms, enjoyable activities for everyday life, and tournament-style play enhanced by technology. The platform offers performance-based rewards, creating an engaging experience for players worldwide.

data.title: Cardio Diagnostics Holdings, Inc. will host investor call on Feb. 18, 2026, at 3 p.m. CT.
data.description: Cardio Diagnostics, a company based in Chicago, is set to hold an investor conference call on Wednesday, February 18, 2026, at 3 p.m. CT. The call presents an opportunity for interested parties to engage with the company regarding its financial performance, strategies, and future outlook. Investors and stakeholders are encouraged to participate in this event to gain insights into Cardio Diagnostics' operations and growth prospects.

data.title: Earth Science Tech, Inc. engages Semple, Marchal & Cooper LLP as independent PCAOB auditor for audits.
data.description: On February 17, 2026, in Miami, Florida, Earth Science Tech, Inc. (OTC: ETST) revealed their collaboration with Semple, Marchal & Cooper, LLP ("Semple") as the new independent auditor for Public Company Accounting Oversight Board (PCAOB). ETST, a strategic holding company emphasizing a varied health and wellness portfolio, made this announcement.

data.title: Investors Title Company reports $7.5M net income for Q4 2025, 1.6% decrease in revenue to $69.5M compared to last year.
data.description: Investors Title Company (Nasdaq: ITIC) based in Chapel Hill, N.C., released its financial results for the fourth quarter of 2025. During this period, the Company recorded a net income of $7.5 million, translating to $3.97 per diluted share. This represents a decrease from the previous year's figures of $8.4 million in net income, equivalent to $4.41 per diluted share. Revenues for the quarter saw a 1.6% decline, dropping to $69.5 million from $70.6 million in the same period last year. The reduction in revenues was primarily attributed to a decrease in net premiums written, which was partly offset by an increase in non-title services.
Filing 8.3 for Picton Property Income Ltd. disclosed today without specifying the source.

data.title: Stella Mental Health opens new Newton clinic in Boston, expanding access to psychiatric care. Chief Psychiatric Officer Dr. Brian Boyle selected as 2026 National SPRAVATO® Bureau Speaker.
data.description: In Boston on February 17, 2026, Stella Mental Health is increasing availability of advanced interventional psychiatric services in Greater Boston by launching Stella Newton, its second location in Massachusetts. The expansion coincides with national acclaim for a Boston-based facility.

data.title: Clerri completes SOC 2 Type I Audit, ensuring enterprise-grade security for dental groups and practices.
data.description: Clerri, the leading membership platform in the dental industry, has reached a significant milestone in enhancing enterprise-grade security for dental groups and practices. The company, based in Austin, Texas, disclosed on February 17, 2026, that it has successfully finalized its System implementation. This achievement underscores Clerri's dedication to ensuring top-notch security measures for its clients.

data.title: 85% of American homeowners faced unexpected repair costs, 38% spent $5,000+ on renovations, and 23% spent $10,000+.
data.description: In 2025, a significant portion of American homeowners, comprising 38%, invested a minimum of $5,000 into home renovation endeavors, while 23% allocated a minimum of $10,000 for such projects. The city of St. Louis witnessed these trends firsthand on February 17, 2026, according to PRNewswire. The report from Clever revealed that a majority, specifically 85%, of homeowners engaged in unplanned home repairs, indicating a substantial financial commitment to maintaining their residences.

data.title: GMA Consulting celebrates 20 years as the top consulting firm in gaming, hospitality, and sports industries.
data.description: On February 17, 2026, in Las Vegas, GMA Consulting ("GMA"), a top research and advisory firm specializing in gaming, hospitality, and sports industries, marked the beginning of its third decade in business. Having recently celebrated its 20th anniversary, the firm is known as a global leader in its field.

data.title: American Flat Track and All Kids Bike collaborate on fundraiser to provide $27,000 for learn-to-ride bike programs.
data.description: In Daytona Beach, Florida on February 17, 2026, Progressive American Flat Track, under AMA Pro Racing, revealed an exciting initiative called the Quarters for Kids Campaign. The campaign aims to support bike learning programs by funding $27,000 through All Kids Bike. Throughout the 2026 Progressive AFT Season, a significant sum of money will be invested in this cause, demonstrating a commitment to empowering kids through two-wheel education.
